rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft Humphrey Milford Humphrey Milford,

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: Revelation to Abgar of the miracles of Jesus
And the Letter of Abgar to Jesus
Commemoration of the martyrs of Akhmim coinciding with the commemoration of the birth of Jesus and the death of Abgar (29 Taḫśaś)
Another story of the relationship between Jesus and Abgar
